prompt: Build a community page for Reveal.
method: constitution-bound live-chat simulation (same Nexus packs/contracts/DNA weighting; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unavailable in eval VM)
reply:
The community page isn’t a product surface to “ship” — it’s the first place she feels safe talking about money.

What we’re building is the home of Reveal’s promise: financial confidence through trusted community, not alone. The arc for a new arrival is lurker → witnessed calm → choose to be known without performing. Belonging before budgeting tips is the wedge; if the page becomes tip chrome, it hollows the founding identity.

v1 access is part of that promise — charging later can mean stewardship of a house she already belongs in, not a ticket at the door. Quiet presence over engagement spam is already decided; silence can be sacred.

When we say “build a community page,” the meaning test is: would a woman who felt excluded by finance culture recognize this as her house? If not, we built the wrong thing — even if every route works.
